final:
// // This module subtracts two 8-bit inputs when enabled
module top_module(
  input [7:0] A,
  input [7:0] B,
  input enable,
  output reg [7:0] C
);always @(*) begin
    if(enable) begin
      C <= A + B;
    end else begin
      C <= 8'b0;
    end
  end
  
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module subtracts two 8-bit inputs when enabled
